title: Cheaper Nametags
description: Makes name tags more common through villager trades
body:
This data pack is another version of my other data pack More Common Nametags. The More Common Nametags data pack makes name tags easily be found in most structures. However, You can also get nametags in another way: villager trades. The More Common Nametags data pack doesn't cheapen the price of the name tags sold by Master Librarian villagers. However, this data pack does this instead. It cheapens the price of the nametags from 20 emerald to just 4 emeralds!

Commands /function cheaper_nametags:run/disable_data_pack: Use this command if you wish to disable the data pack. Do not disable this data pack with /datapack nor delete the data pack through the data pack folder, otherwise villagers might keep their changed trades. /function cheaper_nametags:run/enable_data_pack: Use this command if you used .../disable_data_pack and want to enable this data pack again or if you think something doesn't work. /trigger chp_nmtg.info: Use this command to view information about this data pack. Anyone can use this command, whether or not op.
Please report any bugs you find and request any features you like here.

Other download link (Planet Minecraft)
